message:
fix(cli/package): use CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS to prevent shell expansion corruption

Build hooks like rch (remote compilation helper) can corrupt the RUSTFLAGS
environment variable during shell expansion when it contains spaces or
special characters. Switch to CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS which uses 0x1f
(unit separator) delimited values that survive shell processing intact.

- Replace RUSTFLAGS="-C debuginfo=0" with CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS="-Cdebuginfo=0"
- Explicitly remove RUSTFLAGS to prevent conflicts with CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS
- Add CARGO_ENCODED_RUSTFLAGS to build metadata collection alongside RUSTFLAGS
- Update package metadata test to reflect the new environment variables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
